name: Planted-Evidence Scheme
summary: A doctored proof is slipped where the rival will find and 'expose' it, baiting the victim into acting on a false belief and walking into a deniable trap.

beats.label: Plant false proof
beats.intent: place doctored evidence where it will be found

beats.label: Bait the victim to act
beats.intent: lure the victim into reacting

beats.label: Victim acts on the false belief
beats.intent: the victim commits to the trap

beats.label: Deniable reveal
beats.intent: the 'proof' surfaces, schemer untouched

beats.label: Counter
beats.intent: the fallout is steered to the schemer's gain

preconditions.text: the schemer can place evidence the authority will trust

effects.text: the victim is discredited or condemned on false grounds

info_asymmetry.gap: the authority believes the victim is the culprit; the proof was planted by the schemer
the authority believes the victim is the culprit; the proof was planted by the schemer

examples.text: A doctored ledger is slipped where the rival will find and 'expose' it — walking straight into the trap that names them.

name: Feigned Alliance
summary: An earnest pact and a shared secret just true enough to trust, until the moment it pays to break it at the pivot.

beats.label: Offer alliance
beats.intent: propose a pact the ally will accept

beats.label: Share partial truth
beats.intent: reveal just enough to be believed

beats.label: Ally relies on it
beats.intent: the ally commits resources or trust

beats.label: Betray at the pivot
beats.intent: break the pact when it pays

beats.label: Realign
beats.intent: convert the betrayal into position

preconditions.text: the schemer and the target share a plausible common goal

effects.text: the ally is discarded at the moment of greatest leverage

info_asymmetry.gap: the ally thinks they share a goal; the schemer plans to discard them at the pivot
the ally thinks they share a goal; the schemer plans to discard them at the pivot

examples.text: An earnest pact, a shared secret just true enough to trust — until the moment it pays to break it.

name: Whisper Campaign
summary: A single planted doubt, repeated by mouths that do not know its origin, isolates the target until their patron withdraws support.

beats.label: Seed the rumor
beats.intent: plant a single doubt

beats.label: Rumor spreads
beats.intent: the doubt repeats through unwitting mouths

beats.label: Target isolated
beats.intent: the target loses standing

beats.label: Patron withdraws support
beats.intent: the target's protector steps back

preconditions.text: the target depends on a patron's or court's regard

effects.text: the target is isolated and loses their patron
the rumor's true source stays hidden

info_asymmetry.gap: the court believes the rumor is independent; a single source authored it
the court believes the rumor is independent; a single source authored it

examples.text: A single planted doubt, repeated by mouths that don't know its origin, until the target stands alone.

name: Loyalty-Test Trap
summary: A door left invitingly open is really a test; who steps through reveals exactly what the watcher needed to know.

beats.label: Stage a temptation
beats.intent: set a baited opportunity

beats.label: Observe the response
beats.intent: watch who takes the bait

beats.label: Loyal pass or fail
beats.intent: the test resolves trust or betrayal

beats.label: Reward or purge
beats.intent: act on the revealed truth

preconditions.text: the power-holder suspects a hidden disloyalty

effects.text: the tested party's true loyalty is revealed
the power-holder rewards or purges accordingly

info_asymmetry.gap: the tested party thinks the opportunity is real; it is a staged trap
the tested party thinks the opportunity is real; it is a staged trap

examples.text: A door left invitingly open is really a test; who steps through reveals exactly what the watcher needed to know.

name: Double-Agent Reveal
summary: A leak too precise to be chance; a baited false secret proves who carries tales — and to whom — then turns the mole.

beats.label: Trusted insider acts
beats.intent: the household relies on the insider

beats.label: Small inconsistency noted
beats.intent: a leak too precise to be chance

beats.label: Trap set to confirm
beats.intent: a baited false secret is planted

beats.label: Unmask and turn
beats.intent: confirm the mole and flip them

preconditions.text: a precise leak suggests a trusted insider is compromised

effects.text: the mole is identified and turned or removed

info_asymmetry.gap: the household trusts the insider; the protagonist has quietly confirmed the leak
the household trusts the insider; the protagonist has quietly confirmed the leak

examples.text: A leak too precise to be chance; a baited false secret proves who carries tales — and to whom.

name: Scapegoat Substitution
summary: When blame must land somewhere, the clever hand makes sure it lands on a lesser party while the true actor walks free.

beats.label: Crime must be pinned
beats.intent: blame must land on someone

beats.label: Frame a lesser party
beats.intent: select a blamable scapegoat

beats.label: Evidence steered
beats.intent: guide the inquiry to the scapegoat

beats.label: True actor walks free
beats.intent: the real culprit escapes notice

preconditions.text: a crime demands a culprit and the true actor must stay hidden

info_asymmetry.gap: the investigators believe the scapegoat acted; the true actor arranged it
the investigators believe the scapegoat acted; the true actor arranged it

examples.text: When blame must land somewhere, the clever hand makes sure it lands on someone else.
